liveItems.name: Wing FTP Server Information Disclosure Vulnerability
liveItems.summary: Wing FTP Server contains a generation of error message containing sensitive information vulnerability when using a long value in the UID cookie.

liveItems.name: Google Skia Out-of-Bounds Write Vulnerability
liveItems.summary: Google Skia contains an out-of-bounds write vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to perform out of bounds memory access via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability a...

liveItems.name: n8n Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources Vulnerability
liveItems.summary: n8n contains an improper control of dynamically managed code resources vulnerability in its workflow expression evaluation system that allows for remote code execution.

liveItems.name: SolarWinds Web Help Desk Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
liveItems.summary: SolarWinds Web Help Desk contain a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in AjaxProxy that could allow an attacker to run commands on the host machine.

liveItems.name: Apple Multiple products Use-After-Free Vulnerability
liveItems.summary: Apple macOS, iOS, iPadOS, and Safari 16.6 contain a use-after-free vulnerability due to the processing of maliciously crafted web content that may lead to memory corruption.
